ptxt.intxrefpoff: Rear Brake Pad Removal and Installation:Disc Brake Model

attention2.ptxt: Never polish rear brake pad lining with sandpaper.

If lining is polished with sandpaper, hard particles of sandpaper will remain on the lining and may damage rear brake disc. When rear brake pad lining is faulty, replace rear brake pads with new ones.

item.ptxt: Check for leakage of brake fluid when removing rear brake pads. If leakage is found, repair rear brake caliper.
Replace all rear brake pads at the same time even if only one rear brake pad is defective.
Check thickness of each rear brake pad lining. If any lining is thinner than limit or is excessively worn on one side, replace all rear brake pads.
